title: p53 regulation by MDM2
text: In our experiments MDM2 inhibits TP53 by promoting its ubiquitination and proteasomal degradation in tumor cells.

title: MDM2 ubiquitin ligase activity
text: Multiple lines of evidence demonstrate that MDM2 inhibits TP53 transcriptional activity in stressed cells.

title: MDM2 and MYC crosstalk
text: We further show that MDM2 inhibits MYC by destabilizing the protein in proliferating cells.

title: MDM2 regulation of oncogenes
text: Our biochemical assays confirm that MDM2 inhibits MYC under hypoxic stress.
